## What was done?

## Related Issue
Closes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code refactor
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: adding tests
- [ ] chore: infrastructure / config

## Checklist
- [ ] Code works locally
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`mypy .`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
